title: lycium barbarum var. aurantiicarpum
intro: Lycium barbarum var. aurantiicarpum, also known as the golden berry, is a variety of the Goji plant, a shrub native to Asia and Europe. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-bacterial properties, which may help protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. The health benefits of consuming Lycium barbarum var. aurantiicarpum include improved eye health, immune system function, and cardiovascular health, as well as potential anti-aging effects. Lycium barbarum var. aurantiicarpum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and extracts, and is also consumed as a fresh or dried fruit.
